title: sorghum × sudanense
intro: Sorghum × sudanense, also known as broom sorghum, is a hybrid plant belonging to the sorghum family and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, saponins, and other compounds that are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Some of the health benefits of sorghum × sudanense include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to be consumed for medicinal purposes.
